description: Attempted Docker-orchestrated integration test for API+face-service; abandoned because Jest process spawning is fragile and adds more flakiness than value

asi.rollback_reason: Process spawning in Jest is unreliable for long-running Docker containers; API already has comprehensive unit and route tests; face-service is validated via Docker build + manual health check
